rationale: Section 11.303 governs procedural budget and tax-rate adoption for municipal school districts. It does not address homestead exemption amounts. Subsection (h) merely requires compliance with applicable Tax Code provisions, so a changed exemption amount is absorbed without conflict.
quote: This section may not be construed as authorizing the governing body of a municipality to levy a tax for the support of schools of a municipal school district without fully complying with all applicable provisions of the Tax Code.
_note: No direct conflict. The rule is procedural; the proposed change alters an exemption amount in a different code section. Subsection (h) affirmatively requires Tax Code compliance, so the proposed change would simply be followed.
